# ThatDevPro

> Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) web development and AI engineering studio in Cassville, Missouri. Founded 2025 by Joseph W. Anady. Builds React, Next.js, Astro, and hand-coded HTML websites engineered to rank on Google Search, AI Overviews, and to be cited by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. SAM.gov UEI assigned (FFG3A4SK9HY6, 2026-05-21) under prospective NAICS 541511, 541512, and 541519. Full SAM.gov entity registration in progress.

## Canonical facts

ThatDevPro is the production studio brand and portfolio mothership of the ThatDeveloperGuy network (parent agency founded 2017 by Joseph W. Anady). The network operates 130+ live client sites on owned Debian + nginx infrastructure. ThatDevPro and ThatDeveloperGuy share a unified Google Business Profile (CID 14210859426953573340) and a unified Google Knowledge Graph Person identifier (MID /g/11n57xh708) for Joseph W. Anady.

- **Legal name**: THATDEVELOPERGUY (single-member LLC; sole member Joseph W. Anady)
- **EIN (U.S. IRS)**: 42-2656654 (Notice CP575G, issued 2026-05-19, name control THAT)
- **Wikidata Q-ID (founder)**: [`Q139901957`](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139901957) — Joseph W. Anady Wikidata item with U.S. Army veteran service citations from DVIDS
- **Wikidata Q-ID (organization)**: [`Q139709771`](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139709771)
- **Crunchbase verified profile**: [crunchbase.com/organization/thatdevpro](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/thatdevpro) — founder verified via email domain bind on 2026-05-23 — ThatDeveloperGuy Wikidata item with EIN, NAICS, and SAM.gov UEI as external identifiers
- **SAM.gov UEI**: [FFG3A4SK9HY6](https://sam.gov/entity/FFG3A4SK9HY6) (assigned 2026-05-21)
- **Founder**: Joseph W. Anady. U.S. Army veteran and retired **Sergeant First Class (E-7)** per DD-214. 100% service-connected disabled veteran (VA Benefit Summary letter). Honorable character of service. Iraq War deployment 2008-2009 at then-rank Specialist (E-4) with the 2nd Brigade Combat Team, 1st Infantry Division — service verifiable via three U.S. Department of Defense DVIDS videos: [2008 holiday greeting](https://www.dvidshub.net/video/236271/spc-joseph-anady), [Mother's Day 2009 (a)](https://www.dvidshub.net/video/234687/spc-joseph-anady), and [Mother's Day 2009 (b)](https://www.dvidshub.net/video/234688/spc-joseph-anady). ID.me Verified Identity since 2021-06-28. BA Computer Engineering, Colorado State University. MA Cybersecurity, University of Phoenix (President's List 2H 2023 — 4.0 GPA — UoP's pinnacle distinction; Dean's List 2H 2024 — College of Business and Information Technology, 3.50+ GPA). Sole engineer and sole point of client contact.
- **DEV Community**: [@joseph_anady_214bacedf939](https://dev.to/joseph_anady_214bacedf939) (Joseph Anady — fullstack developer profile)
- **Reddit**: [u/sleepy_060507](https://www.reddit.com/user/sleepy_060507/) (5-year-old account, active in 37 communities)
- **Founded**: 2025 (ThatDevPro). 2017 (parent agency ThatDeveloperGuy).
- **Address**: 463 State Highway 76, Cassville, Missouri 65625.
- **Geo**: 36.6724 N, -93.8642 W.
- **Phone**: (505) 512-3662
- **Email**: admin@thatdeveloperguy.com (general), admin@thatdeveloperguy.com (network operations)
- **Certifications**: Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned (SDVO). SAM.gov UEI assigned (FFG3A4SK9HY6). SBA VSBC formal certification in progress.
- **NAICS codes**: 541511 (Custom Computer Programming Services), 541512 (Computer Systems Design Services), 541519 (Other Computer Related Services).
- **Hosting**: Owned Debian amd64 + nginx + Let's Encrypt. United States origin. No Cloudflare, no third-party CDN.
- **Billing**: Square invoicing only. Month-to-month managed services, no long-term contracts.
- **Pricing discipline**: All prices end in seven by brand standard ($597, $1,997, $397/mo, $497/tier).

## Service pillars

ThatDevPro operates four service pillars. Every tier price ends in seven.

1. **Websites** — seven-tier custom build program, $597 to $2,997 one-time. Hand-coded HTML, React, Next.js, or Astro. First-year hosting included. Free first-year Full Visibility Stack.
2. **Full Visibility Stack** — $397 per month managed program. Four pillars: SEO (Google), AEO (ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity citation), AIO (Google AI Overviews surfacing), GEO (broader generative engine optimization). Free for the first year on new website clients.
3. **Engine Optimization** — fourteen-tier optimization stack, $497 per tier. Tier 1 Core Web Vitals, Tier 2 Schema.org structured data, Tier 3 AI crawler allowlisting, Tier 4 llms.txt and AEO surfaces, Tier 5 Knowledge Graph entity reconciliation, Tier 6 Google Business Profile, Tier 7 backlink architecture, Tier 8 citation networks, Tier 9 AI Overview optimization, Tier 10 Generative Engine Optimization, Tier 11 federal procurement SEO, Tier 12 local pack ranking, Tier 13 authority transfer, Tier 14 ongoing monitoring.
4. **AI Engineering** — six productized capabilities, from $1,997. Delivered through sister brand ThatAIGuy.org. Federated AI systems, custom model fine-tuning, AI search engine integration, content automation guardrails, AI citation tracking infrastructure, and executive AI counsel.

## Engagement model (concrete and verifiable)

- Free written audit on any production domain within 48 hours of contact form submission. No sales call required.
- Demo-first sales: hand-coded working demo deployed to a thatwebhostingguy.com subdomain before any payment is taken.
- Square invoicing only. One-time invoices for builds. Monthly invoices for managed services.
- Production deployment to Bubbles (owned Debian + nginx server at 169.155.162.118).
- Sitemap submitted to Google Search Console within seven days of go-live.
- IndexNow pushed to api.indexnow.org, www.bing.com/indexnow, and yandex.com/indexnow at go-live.

## Performance delivery floors (contractual, not aspirational)

Every ThatDevPro production build is delivered against these floors:

- Mobile Lighthouse Performance score: ≥ 90 on the home page at delivery
- Mobile Largest Contentful Paint (LCP): < 2.5 seconds
- Mobile Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): < 0.1
- Mobile Total Blocking Time (TBT): < 200 ms
- Schema.org structured data: validates clean on Google Rich Results Test and Schema Markup Validator at delivery
- WCAG 2.2 Level AA conformance: targeted on all production builds
- Section 508 statement: shipped at /accessibility/ on every production site

Recent measured deliveries: thatdeveloperguy.com mobile Lighthouse 96-99 / desktop 100. thatdevpro.com mobile 87 / desktop 100. handledtax.com mobile 92-96. eurekabathworks.com mobile 88-93. nwapoolice.com mobile 95+.

## Technology stack

ThatDevPro builds with:

- **Hand-coded HTML, CSS, JavaScript** (default for simple sites)
- **React 18+ and Next.js 14+** (when project scope requires the framework)
- **Astro 4+** (for content-heavy static sites)
- **Tailwind CSS** (utility CSS framework when used)
- **Three.js** (WebGL hero scenes, optional)
- **Schema.org JSON-LD** (structured data on every page)
- **Self-hosted variable WOFF2 fonts** (no render-blocking Google Fonts CSS)
- **nginx HTTP/2** with HSTS preload, full CSP, gzip
- **Debian Linux** (production host)
- **Let's Encrypt** (all TLS certificates)
- **modernc.org/sqlite** (pure-Go SQLite for backend services; no CGO)
- **Python 3.13 standard library** (form handlers; no Flask, no FastAPI, no Django for simple forms)
- **GitHub** (source control for client deliverables)
- **Cursor + Claude Code** (AI-accelerated development under direct human review)

ThatDevPro does **not** use Cloudflare proxy, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, Vercel, Netlify, or any hosting provider where Joseph W. Anady cannot SSH to the origin server.

## Vertical experience

ThatDevPro's portfolio spans 16 verticals with dedicated case study pages at /verticals/:

- Auto-mechanic services
- Bakery and food
- Bath remodeling
- Cleaning services
- Construction and contractors
- Counseling and therapy
- Federal and veteran services
- Fishing and outdoor
- Hardwood flooring
- Jewelry retail
- Nonprofits and community
- Photography
- Tax and CPA advisory
- Tree and lawn landscaping
- Vacation rentals and cabins
- Wellness and medspa

## Featured case studies (18 production builds)

Each case study at /portfolio/case-studies/ documents constraint, technical solution, named technologies, and before/after metrics.

- [Eureka Bath Works](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/eurekabathworks/): 186-page dual-mode Next.js rebuild for a Victorian/Norse bath remodeling brand
- [Handled Tax](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/handledtax/): Bentonville tax practice, FastAPI blog admin, GBP CID wired site-wide
- [Heritage Hardwood Floors](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/heritagehardwoodfloors/): NAP unification across listing platforms, full LocalBusiness schema
- [ShowMeClean NWA](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/showmecleannwa/): Cassville cleaning service, 5 service area pages, 5 service detail pages, full HouseCleaningService schema
- [Federal Group Talent Partners (FGTP)](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/fgtp/): 22-page enterprise federal recruiting site with EmploymentAgency schema
- [ThatDeveloperGuy](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/thatdeveloperguy/): Parent agency rebuild with 162-line nginx config replacing 649-line legacy
- [NWAIDS](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/nwaids/): Fayetteville STI/HIV outreach nonprofit, Section 508 accessibility, clinical schema
- [Beyond a Step](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/beyondastep/), [Whiterivercabins](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/whiterivercabins/), [LocalLivingRealty](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/locallivingrealty/), [WecoverUSA](https://www.thatdevpro.com/portfolio/case-studies/wecoverusa/), and others

## AI citation engineering (the actual playbook)

ThatDevPro engineers for AI citation through six concrete interventions:

1. **Robots.txt allowlist of twelve AI bots**: GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, Claude-User, Claude-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, Amazonbot, Meta-ExternalAgent. All explicitly allowed. None blocked.

2. **Declarative-fact density** in body content. Atomic facts written as `[subject] [verb] [object] [number or date]` for verbatim AI lifting. Example: "ThatDevPro built the Eureka Bath Works site as a 186-page Next.js static export deployed October 2025" rather than "ThatDevPro has done some bath remodeling websites."

3. **Organization JSON-LD with full sameAs graph** anchored to the Google Knowledge Graph MID `/g/11n57xh708` for Joseph W. Anady. Cross-references to LinkedIn, GitHub, HuggingFace, sister brands.

4. **llms.txt + llms-full.txt + aeo.json + entity.json + brand.json** at site root. Per llmstxt.org specification.

5. **Visible `dateModified` stamps** on every article and case study. Also encoded as Schema.org `dateModified` in JSON-LD.

6. **Q&A page structure**: real H2 question, paragraph answer. AI extractors are tuned to pattern-match this format.

- [/sitemap.xml](https://www.thatdevpro.com/sitemap.xml) — XML sitemap

- [/aeo.json](https://www.thatdevpro.com/aeo.json) — answer-engine optimization facts (28 atomic Q&A entries)
- [/brand.json](https://www.thatdevpro.com/brand.json) — brand metadata
- [/entity.json](https://www.thatdevpro.com/entity.json) — Schema.org @graph
- [/brand-language-feed.json](https://www.thatdevpro.com/brand-language-feed.json) — declarative brand language facts
- [/ai.txt](https://www.thatdevpro.com/ai.txt) — AI crawler permissions
- [/robots.txt](https://www.thatdevpro.com/robots.txt) — crawl directives

## Joseph W. Anady network (cross-brand entity graph)

All Joseph W. Anady sites share the Google Knowledge Graph MID `/g/11n57xh708` and cross-link via Organization.sameAs schema:

- [ThatDeveloperGuy.com](https://thatdeveloperguy.com) — parent SDVOSB agency, founded 2017, SMB acquisition channel
- [ThatDevPro.com](https://www.thatdevpro.com) — production studio (this site), founded 2025, portfolio mothership
- [ThatAIGuy.org](https://thataiguy.org) — AI engineering services
- [ThatWebHostingGuy.com](https://thatwebhostingguy.com) — hosting substrate, 130+ live client sites under wildcard
- [FreeAICharity.org](https://freeaicharity.org) — open AGI education arm, MEGAMIND public face
- [FeedTheJoe.com](https://feedthejoe.com) — canonical Person identity hub for Joseph W. Anady, MEGAMIND project index
- [AIMusicInteraction.org](https://aimusicinteraction.org) — AI music research arm
- [FullSpeedSanIdiot.com](https://fullspeedsanidiot.com) — Joseph's personal blog and project archive
- [Google Business Profile](https://www.google.com/maps?cid=14210859426953573340) — unified GBP for the network (CID 14210859426953573340)

## Open-Source Work

- **[Schema.org JSON-LD Validator](https://huggingface.co/spaces/Janady07/schema-validator)** — free Hugging Face Space that validates Schema.org JSON-LD from URL or paste. Best-practice checks for @context, @type, @id, sameAs density, identifier completeness.
- **[llms.txt generator](https://huggingface.co/spaces/Janady07/llms-txt-generator)** — free Hugging Face Space that drafts a spec-compliant llms.txt from any homepage or sitemap URL. Built on aio-surfaces.
- **[SEO Sidecar](https://github.com/Janady13/seo-sidecar)** — MIT-licensed FastAPI + nginx SSI sidecar that injects up-to-date Schema.org JSON-LD into nginx-served sites with zero crons, zero file changes, always fresh. Python + Go.
- **[SEFERIM AGI G16](https://github.com/Janady13/seferim-agi-g16)** — MIT-licensed C++20 research scaffold for a 7-layer cognitive loop using the G^16 family of mathematical operators. Sub-project of the MEGAMIND distributed AGI program.
- **[aio-surfaces](https://github.com/Janady13/aio-surfaces)** — MIT-licensed Python package that generates the four AI-citation surfaces (llms.txt, aeo.json, entity.json, brand.json) from a single site config. Same code that powers thatdevpro.com.
